name: Frontier Hammer Companies
summary: Mixed crews that defend, repair, and push dangerous industrial frontiers in the Eternal Lands.
motive: Secure extraction zones and keep remote infrastructure alive in lands where predators and geothermal hazards constantly break it.
power_relations: Subordinate to giant authority and industrial clans
Depend on Engineers’ Consortium and Miners’ Assembly logistics
visible_membership_base: Militia laborers, haulers, wall crews, watchtower teams.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Remote crews can slide into resentment when quotas rise faster than protection or rest.
